title: The zkSYS Genesis Public Testnet Launched Yesterday!
message_html: The zkSYS Genesis Public Testnet Launched Yesterday! ...
snippet: Syscoin (@syscoin): The zkSYS Genesis Public Testnet Launched Yesterday! The first Edgechain on Syscoin’s modular stack is open for builders, with Bitcoin-secured settlement and ZK rollup proofs. The Latest Syscoin Ecosystem Update Is Available Today: 🔗 https://syscoin.org/news/eco-update-26326 ⚡ zk
